Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Marta Eisenberg, Esq., for Annemarie Donjacour, Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel reports that her client currently has the accounting which should be filed as soon as it is reviewed and approved by her client and requests a four-to-six-week continuance accordingly.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Sep-23-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Rowena Navia, Esq., for Annemarie Donjacour, Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel advises that an accounting is with the accountant and will be filed shortly, counsel requests a continuance for the completion and filing of the accounting. A continuance date is discussed and confirmed.

The subject matter is continued to Jul-29-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file the accounting by Jul-15-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Chwin. Not Reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

* ERROR *
Off Calendar Jan-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Will Doyle, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Annemarie Donjacour, Petitioner/Trustee.

At the outset, the court acknowledges Petitioner's recently filed supplemental declaration and reminds the parties of the court's super-fiduciary duty to oversee how the trust is administered.

After additional discussion, the court waves the notice issues and takes the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Will Doyle appeared by zoom for Annemarie Donjacour.

The court stated that it is waiting for the second accounting. Mr. Doyle stated that they have the accounting completed, that the petition is ready, that they just sent it out for the client's review yesterday, and that they should have it filed next week. Status on filing of the second accounting is continued to August 8, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition is to be filed by July 25, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; William Doyle appearing via zoom for Annamarie Donjacour (Trustee).

The Court informed Mr. Doyle that accounting number two for the period of February 01, 2021 through January 31, 2023 needs to be filed. Mr. Doyle requested 45 to 60 days. Future accounting is continued to July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
